blocks.text: Barcelona Fight for the Title — Plus a Big Wednesday Night in La Liga

Wednesday delivers a full slate of La Liga and Premier League football. The night's standout: Barcelona at home against Celta Vigo, needing maximum points to stay ahead in a tight title race. Manchester City also have work to do at Turf Moor.
⚽ Celta Vigo at Barcelona — title race crunch time at Camp Nou
🎮 BIG vs 100 Thieves — CCT Global Finals 2026, rain (Håvard Nygaard) leads 100 Thieves in Portugal
